title: The Last Piece of Cake
content: After a long family dinner, only one piece of chocolate cake remained on the kitchen table. Everyone noticed it, but nobody wanted to seem greedy by taking the last slice immediately. For several minutes, different family members politely offered it to one another while secretly hoping someone else would refuse. Eventually, Olivia’s younger brother quietly took the plate and started eating the cake without saying anything. The entire table burst into laughter at his confidence. Although the situation was simple, it became one of those small family moments everyone continued joking about long after dinner had ended.
